message:
web: Add previewBlobSha256 column for transcript list thumbnails

Store the first user message's image SHA256 in the transcripts table
for efficient thumbnail display in the list view. The preview blob
is extracted during ingest and updated on re-sync.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/jzs3motrrd
